pitfalls_avoided: Cron NOT auto-registered — proposal only, awaiting operator approval (per Phase 3 directive and ACP carve-out #1)
Kernel-doc edits routed through Routing Ledger + Step-5 QA + PHASEREPORT (per ACP standing rule and Phase 2 P5 + Phase 3 P4 protocol)
Goal card has measurable success criteria, not vague 'keep docs clean' (per goal-loop skill pitfalls)
Cadence is monthly, not weekly — Phase 1 ACP recommendation for weekly was downgraded to monthly to honor no-spam rule (no high-frequency cron noise)
Mechanical mirror-only fixes are within autonomous scope; kernel-doc edits are explicit STOP conditions (no accidental SOUL/AGENTS mutation)
P0 fix cards spawned as separate cards; P1 backlog tracked in P1_BACKLOG.md, not auto-fixed
Step-5 QA is mandatory for P0 only — P1/P2 mechanical fixes may proceed without Step-5 (P5 discipline from doc-integrity audit 2026-06-23)
